---
title: "picrust2"
author: "Lasse Steffensen"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: html_document
---


................................................................................
                                      Pre
................................................................................

```{r}

setwd("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2")

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

# data
marker_predicted_and_nsti_meso <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/meso/combined_marker_predicted_and_nsti.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

marker_predicted_and_nsti_thermo <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/thermo/combined_marker_predicted_and_nsti.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

marker_predicted_and_nsti_test <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/test_data/combined_marker_predicted_and_nsti.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")


path_abun_contrib_meso <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/meso/pathways_out/path_abun_contrib.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

path_abun_contrib_thermo <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/thermo/pathways_out/path_abun_contrib.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

path_abun_contrib_test <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/test_data/pathways_out/path_abun_contrib.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")


path_abun_unstrat_meso <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/meso/pathways_out/path_abun_unstrat.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

path_abun_unstrat_thermo <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/thermo/pathways_out/path_abun_unstrat.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

path_abun_unstrat_test <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/test_data/pathways_out/path_abun_unstrat.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")



pred_metagenome_unstrat_meso <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/meso/EC_metagenome_out/pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

pred_metagenome_unstrat_thermo <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/thermo/EC_metagenome_out/pred_metagenome_unstrat.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

pred_metagenome_strat_meso <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/meso/EC_metagenome_out/pred_metagenome_contrib.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")

pred_metagenome_strat_thermo <- read.csv("C:/Users/lasse/Desktop/wd/picrust2/df/thermo/EC_metagenome_out/pred_metagenome_contrib.tsv", header = TRUE, sep = "\t")



```

Target pathways
```{r}

# Vectors with target pathways, labels, and phases
pathways <- c("METH-ACETATE-PWY", "METHANOGENESIS-PWY", "CO2FORM-PWY", "PWY-5247", "PWY-5259", "PWY-8480", "PWY-5676", "P163-PWY", "CENTFERM-PWY", "PWY-5677", "PWY-8086", "PWY-5494", "PWY0-43", "PWY-5088", "GLUDEG-II-PWY", "P108-PWY", "PWY-5536", "PWY2DDB-10", "PWY-8377", "PWY-8274", "PWY-5481", "P41-PWY", "PWY-5100", "PWY-7246", "PWY-7248", "PWY-1081")

labels <- c("Acetoclastic methanogenesis", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogenesis", "Methanogenesis from methanol", "Methanogenesis from methylamine", "Methanogenesis from methanethiol", "Wood-Ljungdahl pathway (homoacetogenesis)", "Acetyl-CoA fermentation to butanoate", "Lysine fermentation to butanoate + acetate", "Pyruvate fermentation to butanoate", "Succinate fermentation to butanoate", "(S)-lactate fermentation to propanoate", "(R)-lactate fermentation to propanoate", "Succinate fermentation to propanoate", "L-Glutamate degradation VIII (to propanoate)", "L-Glutamate degradation VII (to butanoate)", "Pyruvate fermentation to propanoate I", "acetate formation from acetyl-CoA III (succinate)", "Lactate conversion to acetate", "Lactate fermentation to acetate, CO2, and hydrogen", "Pyruvate fermentation to (R)-lactate", "Pyruvate fermentation to (S)-lactate", "Pyruvate fermentation to acetate and (S)-lactate I", "Pyruvate fermentation to acetate and lactate II", "Pectin degradation I", "Pectin degradation II", "Pectin degradation III")

phases <- c("Methanogenesis", "Methanogenesis", "Methanogenesis", "Methanogenesis", "Methanogenesis", "Acetogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Acidogenesis", "Hydrolysis", "Hydrolysis", "Hydrolysis")

# Create df 
pathway_df <- tibble(
  pathway = pathways,
  label   = labels,
  phase   = phases
)

pathway_df <- pathway_df %>%
  mutate(
    pathway = factor(pathway, levels = pathways),
    label   = factor(label, levels = labels),
    phase   = factor(phase)
  )

# Correct order
labels_ordered <- c("Pectin degradation I", "Pectin degradation II", "Pectin degradation III", "L-Glutamate degradation VIII (to propanoate)", "L-Glutamate degradation VII (to butanoate)", "Lysine fermentation to butanoate + acetate", "Pyruvate fermentation to butanoate", "Pyruvate fermentation to propanoate I", "Pyruvate fermentation to (R)-lactate", "Pyruvate fermentation to (S)-lactate", "Pyruvate fermentation to acetate and (S)-lactate I", "Pyruvate fermentation to acetate and lactate II", "acetate formation from acetyl-CoA III (succinate)", "Acetyl-CoA fermentation to butanoate", "Succinate fermentation to butanoate", "Succinate fermentation to propanoate", "(S)-lactate fermentation to propanoate", "(R)-lactate fermentation to propanoate", "Lactate conversion to acetate", "Lactate fermentation to acetate, CO2, and hydrogen", "Wood-Ljungdahl pathway (homoacetogenesis)", "Acetoclastic methanogenesis", "Hydrogenotrophic methanogenesis", "Methanogenesis from methanol", "Methanogenesis from methylamine", "Methanogenesis from methanethiol")


# reorder based on labels_ordered
pathway_df <- pathway_df %>%
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = labels_ordered)) %>%
  arrange(label)



```

```{r}

path_abun_contrib_meso_target <- path_abun_contrib_meso %>%
  filter(function. %in% pathways)

path_abun_contrib_thermo_target <- path_abun_contrib_thermo %>%
  filter(function. %in% pathways)

path_abun_contrib_test_target <- path_abun_contrib_test %>%
  filter(function. %in% pathways)


path_abun_unstrat_meso_target <- path_abun_unstrat_meso %>%
  filter(pathway %in% pathways)

path_abun_unstrat_thermo_target <- path_abun_unstrat_thermo %>%
  filter(pathway %in% pathways)


```




................................................................................
                              NSTI distribution
................................................................................

Violin plot
```{r}


# Combine NSTI values from all three datasets into one plotting dataframe
nsti_df <- bind_rows(
  marker_predicted_and_nsti_meso %>%
    transmute(
      sample_type = "Mesophilic",
      NSTI = metadata_NSTI
    ),
  marker_predicted_and_nsti_thermo %>%
    transmute(
      sample_type = "Thermophilic",
      NSTI = metadata_NSTI
    ),
  marker_predicted_and_nsti_test %>%
    transmute(
      sample_type = "PICRUSt2 tutorial data",
      NSTI = metadata_NSTI
    )
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(NSTI)) %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type = factor(
      sample_type,
      levels = c("PICRUSt2 tutorial data", "Mesophilic", "Thermophilic")
    )
  )

# summary table
nsti_summary <- nsti_df %>%
  group_by(sample_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(NSTI),
    median = median(NSTI),
    sd = sd(NSTI),
    min = min(NSTI),
    max = max(NSTI),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

print(nsti_summary)

# Violin plot
p <- ggplot(nsti_df, aes(x = sample_type, y = NSTI, fill = sample_type)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, width = 0.9, alpha = 0.8, colour = NA) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.14,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill = "white",
    colour = "black",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    shape = 21,
    size = 2.8,
    fill = "white",
    colour = "black",
    stroke = 0.5
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, max(nsti_df$NSTI, na.rm = TRUE), by = 0.1),
    minor_breaks = seq(0, max(nsti_df$NSTI, na.rm = TRUE), by = 0.05),
    limits = c(0, 1.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "NSTI",
    title = "Distribution of NSTI values across datasets"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, colour = "grey85"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )


ggsave(filename = "figures/violin_plot.png", plot = p,
       width = 7, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

................................................................................
                        Unstratified pathway abundances
................................................................................

```{r}



phase_cols <- c(
  Hydrolysis     = "navyblue",
  Acidogenesis   = "palegreen4",
  Acetogenesis   = "palevioletred4",
  Methanogenesis = "mediumpurple4"
)

# Extract abundance per pathway
meso_abun <- path_abun_unstrat_meso %>%
  filter(pathway %in% pathways) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -pathway,
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "abundance"
  ) %>%
  group_by(pathway) %>%
  summarise(abundance = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Join onto full pathway list → ensures zeros are included
plot_meso_path <- pathway_df %>%
  left_join(meso_abun, by = c("pathway" = "pathway")) %>%
  mutate(
    abundance = replace_na(abundance, 0),
    label = factor(label, levels = labels_ordered),
    phase = factor(
      phase,
      levels = c("Hydrolysis", "Acidogenesis", "Acetogenesis", "Methanogenesis")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(label)

# Plot
p <- ggplot(plot_meso_path, aes(x = label, y = abundance, fill = phase)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(. ~ phase, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phase_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(abundance, 2)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Pathways",
    y = "Unstratified pathway abundance",
    title = "Mesophilic sample: target pathway abundances",
    fill = "Phase"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 7),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "pseudo_log",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08)),
    limits = c(0, 300000)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    expand = expansion(add = 1)
  )



# ..............................................................................

# Extract abundance per pathway
thermo_abun <- path_abun_unstrat_thermo %>%
  filter(pathway %in% pathways) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -pathway,
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "abundance"
  ) %>%
  group_by(pathway) %>%
  summarise(abundance = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Join onto full pathway list → ensures zeros are included
plot_thermo_path <- pathway_df %>%
  left_join(thermo_abun, by = c("pathway" = "pathway")) %>%
  mutate(
    abundance = replace_na(abundance, 0),
    label = factor(label, levels = labels_ordered),
    phase = factor(
      phase,
      levels = c("Hydrolysis", "Acidogenesis", "Acetogenesis", "Methanogenesis")
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(label)

# Plot
l <- ggplot(plot_thermo_path, aes(x = label, y = abundance, fill = phase)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  facet_grid(. ~ phase, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = phase_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(abundance, 2)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Pathways",
    y = "Unstratified pathway abundance",
    title = "Thermophilic sample: target pathway abundances",
    fill = "Phase"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 7),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "pseudo_log",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08)),
    limits = c(0, 300000)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    expand = expansion(add = 1)
  )


g <- p | l

ggsave(filename = "figures/barplot.png", plot = g,
       width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```


................................................................................
                           Unstratified EC abundances
................................................................................

Target ECs
```{r}

ECs <- c("3.2.15", "3.2.1.67", "3.2.1.82", "3.2.1.171", "3.2.1.174", "3.2.1.173", "3.2.1.89", "3.2.1.181", "3.2.1.164", "3.2.1.23", "3.2.1.99", "3.2.1.55", "4.2.2.2", "4.2.2.9", "4.2.2.10", "4.2.2.23", "4.2.2.24", "3.1.1.11", "3.2.1.73")

enzymes <- c("Endopolygalacturonase", "Exopolygalacturonase", "Exo-poly-alpha-D-galacturonosidase", "Rhamnogalacturonan hydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan rhamnohydrolase", "Rhamnogalacturonan galacturonohydrolase", "Endo (1,4) galactanase", "Endo (1,3) galactanase", "Endo (1,6) galactanase", "beta-galactosidase", "Endoarabinase", "alpha-L-arabinofuranosidase", "Endopectate lyase", "Exopectate lyase", "Endopectin lyase", "Rhamnogalacturonan endolyase", "Rhamnogalacturonan exolyase", "Pectin methyl esterase", "Feruloyl esterase")

group <- c("Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Hydrolases", "Lyases", "Lyases", "Lyases", "Lyases", "Lyases", "Esterases", "Esterases")

enzymes_df <- tibble(
  EC = ECs,
  enzyme   = enzymes,
  group   = group
)

```

Unstrat EC
```{r}


group_cols <- c(
  Hydrolases = "navyblue",
  Lyases     = "palegreen4",
  Esterases  = "palevioletred4"
)

# Extract EC abundances from unstratified table
ec_abun_meso <- pred_metagenome_unstrat_meso %>%
  filter(function. %in% ECs) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -function.,
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "abundance"
  ) %>%
  group_by(function.) %>%
  summarise(
    abundance = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Join onto full EC list so missing ECs are kept as zero
plot_ec_meso <- enzymes_df %>%
  left_join(ec_abun_meso, by = c("EC" = "function.")) %>%
  mutate(
    abundance = replace_na(abundance, 0),
    enzyme = factor(enzyme, levels = enzymes),
    group = factor(group, levels = c("Hydrolases", "Lyases", "Esterases"))
  )

# Plot
pl <- ggplot(plot_ec_meso, aes(x = enzyme, y = abundance, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  facet_grid(. ~ group, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(abundance, 0)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 2.2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Enzymes",
    y = "Unstratified EC abundance",
    title = "Mesophilic sample: target EC abundances",
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 7),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "pseudo_log",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08)),
    limits = c(0, 300000)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    expand = expansion(add = 0.6)
  )


# ..............................................................................

# Extract EC abundances from unstratified table
ec_abun_thermo <- pred_metagenome_unstrat_thermo %>%
  filter(function. %in% ECs) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -function.,
    names_to = "sample",
    values_to = "abundance"
  ) %>%
  group_by(function.) %>%
  summarise(
    abundance = sum(abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Join onto full EC list so missing ECs are kept as zero
plot_ec_thermo <- enzymes_df %>%
  left_join(ec_abun_thermo, by = c("EC" = "function.")) %>%
  mutate(
    abundance = replace_na(abundance, 0),
    enzyme = factor(enzyme, levels = enzymes),
    group = factor(group, levels = c("Hydrolases", "Lyases", "Esterases"))
  )

# Plot
ot <- ggplot(plot_ec_thermo, aes(x = enzyme, y = abundance, fill = group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  facet_grid(. ~ group, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = group_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(abundance, 0)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 2.2
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Enzymes",
    y = "Unstratified EC abundance",
    title = "Mesophilic sample: target EC abundances",
    fill = "Group"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 7),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "pseudo_log",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08)),
    limits = c(0, 300000)
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    expand = expansion(add = 0.6)
  )


plot <- pl | ot

ggsave(filename = "figures/EC_unstrat.png", plot = plot,
       width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

Strat EC 
```{r}

# --- TOP 10 TAXA --------------------------------------------------------------

top_taxa <- pred_metagenome_strat_meso %>%
  filter(function. %in% ECs) %>%
  group_by(taxon) %>%
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(taxon_function_abun, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_abundance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  pull(taxon)

# --- EC × TAXON ABUNDANCE -----------------------------------------------------

ec_tax_meso <- pred_metagenome_strat_meso %>%
  filter(function. %in% ECs) %>%
  mutate(
    taxon_plot = if_else(taxon %in% top_taxa, taxon, "Other")
  ) %>%
  group_by(function., taxon_plot) %>%
  summarise(
    abundance = sum(taxon_function_abun, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- TOTAL PER EC -------------------------------------------------------------

ec_totals <- ec_tax_meso %>%
  group_by(function.) %>%
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(abundance), .groups = "drop")

# --- JOIN WITH METADATA -------------------------------------------------------

plot_ec_meso_strat <- enzymes_df %>%
  left_join(ec_tax_meso, by = c("EC" = "function.")) %>%
  left_join(ec_totals, by = c("EC" = "function.")) %>%
  mutate(
    taxon_plot = replace_na(taxon_plot, "Other"),
    abundance  = replace_na(abundance, 0),
    total_abundance = replace_na(total_abundance, 0),
    enzyme = factor(enzyme, levels = enzymes),
    group  = factor(group, levels = c("Hydrolases", "Lyases", "Esterases"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(EC, enzyme, group, taxon_plot, total_abundance) %>%
  summarise(abundance = sum(abundance), .groups = "drop")

# --- COLOURS ------------------------------------------------------------------

taxon_cols <- c(
  setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(top_taxa)), top_taxa),
  Other = "grey70"
)

plot_ec_meso_strat <- plot_ec_meso_strat %>%
  mutate(
    taxon_plot = factor(taxon_plot, levels = c(top_taxa, "Other"))
  )

# --- PLOT ---------------------------------------------------------------------

ps <- ggplot(plot_ec_meso_strat, aes(x = enzyme, y = abundance, fill = taxon_plot)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  
  # total labels (one per bar)
  geom_text(
    data = plot_ec_meso_strat %>%
      distinct(EC, enzyme, group, total_abundance),
    aes(x = enzyme, y = total_abundance, label = round(total_abundance, 0)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 2.3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  
  facet_grid(. ~ group, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = taxon_cols, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = "Enzymes",
    y = "Stratified EC abundance",
    title = "Mesophilic sample: target EC abundances by taxon"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 7),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    legend.position = "none"   # <-- remove legend
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(
    expand = expansion(add = 0.6)
  )

ps

ggsave(filename = "figures/test.png", plot = ps,
       width = 7, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# ..............................................................................



beta_galactosidase <- pred_metagenome_strat_meso %>%
  filter(function. == "3.2.1.23")


```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
